feed.title: Chirpy
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Linux Modules
entry.summary: It’s a write-up about the room : Try Hack Me - Room : Linux Modules Task 1 : Let’s Introduce In this room we will be working with the most used commands of linux terminal. Such as : du grep, egrep, fgrep tr awk sed xargs curl wget xxd and some more of similar commands Task 2 : du About du Command Flag Description -a Wi...
